description: Pilot — Fall; serpent and Adam lowercase, Yahweh capitalized
mustContain: Now the serpent was more subtle than any animal of the field which Yahweh God had made. he said to the woman
Yahweh God called to the man, and said to him, “Where are you?”
mustNotContain: serpent was more subtle than any animal of the field which Yahweh God had made. He said to the woman
Yahweh God called to the man, and said to Him, “Where are you?”
